title: ZXPong Leaderboards
description: Understand known ZXPong leaderboard surfaces, including Longest Rally and shared ZX Series score and coin rankings.
summary: ZXPong leaderboard planning focuses on rally consistency and shared ZX Series progression surfaces.
heroImageAlt: Placeholder artwork for pending ZXPong leaderboard image
sourceNotes: Current central ZX Series manifest identifies Longest Rally as the submitted ZXPong app leaderboard.
Highest Score remains a preserved source constant but is not documented as an active submitted app leaderboard here.

sections.heading: Known leaderboards
paragraphs: Current ZXPong documentation and source identify Longest Rally as the app-specific leaderboard surface.
ZXPong also participates in shared ZX Series leaderboard surfaces such as total score and total coins through the shared Retro leaderboard model.

sections.heading: How to improve
paragraphs: For Longest Rally, prioritize safe returns and predictable paddle recovery.
Treat each session as a consistency attempt: the best leaderboard work usually comes from keeping several rallies stable rather than overplaying the first return.
